name: Studio Force II Plus 48

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F4BFAD05-B562-11F0-B388-42010A37C006

comment: Studio Force II Plus 48 is using a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors. It is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.

DMX Lost Def Fx Stay To Last State - Custom
DMX Lost Def Fx Goes Black - Custom
DMX Lost Def Fx To Selected Look - Custom

gwSpecs.description: Studio Force II Plus 48 is using a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors. It is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.
